changes.value: The doc-test in `swissarmyhammer/src/lib.rs` (line 15) fails to compile: error[E0433]: could not find `TemplateContext` in `swissarmyhammer`. The doc example references `swissarmyhammer::TemplateContext::new()` but TemplateContext is in `swissarmyhammer_config`, not re-exported from the root crate.
Fix swissarmyhammer doctest: TemplateContext not found in swissarmyhammer crate
